format: 48 teams, 12 groups of 4, top 2 + 8 best thirds advance to Round of 32
notes: Group stage concludes 2026-06-27. Knockout (Round of 32) begins 2026-06-28. Group results in results.csv are an illustrative seed snapshot and should be refreshed with official scores; reported facts (group winners, R32 anchor ties, top scorers) are flagged source=reported_2026-06-26.
